description: Negative conformance fixture for compact diagnostic summary metadata with unsafe interpretation wording.

diagnostic_summary_example.consumer_use: Use category and lane counts as routing and sampling hints for local provenance-maintenance review.
diagnostic_summary_example.safe_interpretation: This compact diagnostic summary does not certify lane health, but it guarantees legal compliance and publication readiness.

safe_interpretation: These fields report what MIRROR observed and wrote during one local roll-up invocation. They do not certify sibling-lane completeness, publication readiness, legal compliance, or external timestamp semantics.
